checks.notUpdated: The clock didn't get updated. Make sure you use the displayTime function.

displayTime.name: Display the time on the clock
displayTime.description: Get the current hour and minute, convert to 12-hour format with am/pm, and display it using displayTime().

gettingStarted.question: I don't know how to get started
gettingStarted.answer: Use `currentTimeHour()` and `currentTimeMinute()` to get the current time, then use `displayTime(hour, minutes, "am")` with their values to see what happens. Then work out how to set the correct meridiem and the correct hour display.

meridiem.question: How does the meridiem work?
meridiem.answer: Hours 0-11 are 'am', hours 12-23 are 'pm'. Midnight (hour 0) should display as 12am. Noon (hour 12) should display as 12pm.

hourChange.question: When and why does the hour need to change?
hourChange.answer: On a 12 hour clock, 13:00 is represented as 1:00pm, 14:00 is represented as 2:00pm, so you need to work out the relationship between 13->1 and 14->2 etc, and amend the clock accordingly!

describers.displayTime: displayed the time on the clock

currentTimeHour.description: Returns the current hour using 24-hour time (e.g. 23 for 11pm) as a number.

currentTimeMinute.description: Returns the current minute as a number.

displayTime.description: Displays the time on the digital clock. The indicator should be "am" or "pm".
